_comment: Realism regression baseline for _audit_gate.js. Reproducible because the audits are SEEDED (see the seed prelude in each _*_audit.js). The gate fails if a metric drifts from 'value' by more than 'tol'. 'nfl' is the audit's own acceptable band (informational warning only, not a failure). N=1 season is chosen for CI speed; the gate is REGRESSION-focused (did an engine/talent change move realism?), not a realism-validity claim — run larger N manually for that (see AUDIT.md). Re-baseline after an intentional change by updating 'value' in the same commit.
